summary: External interference on Cell-19 caused Low SINR and PRB saturation.
Backhaul link failure on gNB caused N2 path down and cells unavailable.
PCI collision between neighboring cells caused handover failure spike.
Remote radio unit power failure caused cell unavailable alarm.
SMF policy database timeout caused PDU session failures.
AMF overload after signaling spike caused registration rejects.
UPF CPU saturation degraded enterprise APN throughput.
Core DNS resolver outage caused NRF service discovery timeout.
Fiber attenuation on backhaul link caused optical power low and CRC errors.
Router interface admin down after change caused link down.
BGP neighbor instability due to MTU mismatch caused route flap.
Transport link congestion on Router-09 caused queue drops and latency.
